nodes.itemHTML: • TestFit - TestFit features algorithms and co-creation tools help developers, architects, urban planners and more to solve hotel, parking or multifamily building site plans in seconds.

nodes.itemHTML: • Delve - Delve uses generative design and AI to reveal the very best options for your project priorities and site design metrics.
• nickgerace/gfoldstars187 [gfold] - CLI tool to help keep track of multiple Git repositories
• SwiftCurrentstars277 - A library for managing complex workflows.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Platforms and Software Resources

Transportation Planning Tools and Platforms
nodes.itemHTML: • Remix - A platform to empower cities to plan the best possible transportation system — from public transit to safer streets to ever-increasing new modes of mobility. Remix provides tools to edit & test GTFS, generate multimodal streets, and explore relevant data.

nodes.itemHTML: • Streetmix - A collaborative civic engagement platform for urban design. Design, remix, and share your neighborhood street with Streetmix.

    • Conveystars269 - Layer 4 Load Balancer with dynamic configuration loading.

• avito-tech/bioyinostars207 — A high-performance scalable StatsD compatible server.

Urban Design Tools and Platforms
nodes.itemHTML: • CityEngine - CityEngine is advanced 3D modeling software for creating huge, interactive and immersive urban environments in less time than traditional modeling techniques. The cities you create using CityEngine can be based on real-world GIS data and the procedural rules that can help quickly create streetsstars119 & buildings.
• vue-word-highlighterstars97 - The word highlighter library for Vue 2 and Vue 3.
• Vulkan Game Engine Tutorial - Tutorial series on making a vulkan game engine by Brendan Galea on YouTube.

Educational and Informational Resources

General Planning Information and News
nodes.itemHTML: • Planopedia - Organized by the Planning News aggregator Planetizen this mini-planning encyclopedia explores various urban planning concepts and terms.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Educational and Informational Resources

General Planning Information and News
nodes.itemHTML: • ULI - ULI is the oldest and largest network of cross-disciplinary real estate and land use experts in the world.
• HIFLD - This site provides National foundation-level geospatial data within the open public domain that can be useful to support community preparedness, resiliency, research, and more.
• HPMS - The HPMS is a national level highway information system that includes data on the extent, condition, performance, use and operating characteristics of the nation's highways.
• CloudCannon - The Git-based CMS for your Jamstack sites.
• ARAstars1.5k - ARA Records Ansible playbooks and makes them easier to understand and troubleshoot with a reporting API, UI and CLI.
• ARAstars1.6k - ARA Records Ansible playbooks and makes them easier to understand and troubleshoot with a reporting API, UI and CLI.
• vue-datepicker-uistars401 - A datepicker component for vue.js

• crystal-bacnetstars0 - BACnet protocol implementation with BACnet/IP client
• crunitsstars6 - Tool for converting units of measure (miles to kilometers, celsius to fahrenheit etc)
• jakewvincent/texmagic.nvimstars26 - Enhance the lspconfig settings for Texlab by defining any number of custom LaTeX build engines and selecting them with magic comments.
• Apache Guacamole™ — Open source clientless remote desktop gateway
• Hygger — Project management platform. Free plan offers unlimited users,projects & boards with 100 MB Storage.
• Ximera : free interactive mathematics textbooks (Ohio State University)
• SOLID Machine Learning - The SOLID principles applied to Machine Learning.

• StackStorm - StackStorm (aka IFTTT for Ops) is event-driven automation for auto-remediation, security responses, troubleshooting, deployments, and more. Includes rules engine, workflow, 160 integration packs with 6000+ actions and ChatOps. (Source Codestars5k) Apache-2.0 Python

nodes.categoryHTML:
Software

Calendar & Contacts - CalDAV or CardDAV Web-based Clients
nodes.itemHTML: • InfCloud - Open source CalDAV/CardDAV web client implementation. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Javascript
• Inboxen - Inboxen is a service that provides you with an infinite number of unique inboxes. (Source Codestars249) GPL-3.0 Python
• Mail-in-a-Box - Turns any Ubuntu server into a fully functional mail server with one command. (Source Codestars11.4k) CC0-1.0 Shell
• SimpleLogin - Open source email alias solution to protect your email address. Comes with browser extensions and mobile apps. (Source Codestars3k) MIT Docker/Python
• Ergo - Modern IRCv3 server written in Go, combining the features of an ircd, a services framework, and a bouncer. (Source Codestars1.8k) MIT Go
• The Lounge - Self-hosted web IRC client. (Demo, Source Codestars4.9k) MIT Nodejs
• EpochTalkstars127 - Next Generation Forum Software. MIT Nodejs
• NodeBB - Forum software built for the modern web. (Source Codestars13k) GPL-3.0 Nodejs
• Tokumei - Anonymous microblogging platform. (Source Code) ISC rc

• Papermerge - Open Source Document Management System focused on scanned documents (electronic archives). Features file browsing in similar way to dropbox/google drive. OCR, full text search, text overlay/selection. (Source Codestars1.8k) Apache-2.0 Python
• Calibre Webstars7.7k - Web app providing a clean interface for browsing, reading and downloading eBooks using an existing Calibre database. GPL-3.0 Python
• The Epube - Self-hosted web EPUB reader using EPUB.js, Bootstrap, and Calibre. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 PHP

• Open Source Routing Machine (OSRM) - High performance routing engine designed to run on OpenStreetMap data and offering an HTTP API, C++ library interface, and Nodejs wrapper. (Demo, Source Codestars5.2k) BSD-2-Clause C++
• μloggerstars410 - Collect geolocation from users in real-time and display their GPS tracks on a website. (Demo) GPL-3.0 PHP
• AzuraCast - A modern and accessible self-hosted web radio management suite. (Source Codestars2.1k) Apache-2.0 PHP
• Mopidy MusicBoxstars401 - Web Client for Mopidy Music Server. Apache-2.0 HTML5
• Open Streaming Platform - Self-Hosted alternative to Twitch and Youtube Live for live and on-demand video streaming. (Source Code) MIT Python
• Radiumstars162 - Synced stream and video playback with VOD capabilities utilizing HLS. Developed for movie nights but has many use cases. (Demo) MIT Nodejs/Docker
• Databunker - Network-based, self-hosted, GDPR compliant, secure database for personal data or PII. (Source Codestars1k) MIT Go
• graph-vlstars28 - Identity document verification using Machine Learning and GraphQL. MIT Python
• ytdl-webserverstars1.4k - Docker-ready webserver for downloading youtube videos. MIT Nodejs
• BTCPay Server - A self-hosted Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies payment processor. (Demo, Source Code) MIT C#

• Firefly III - Firefly III is a modern financial manager. It helps you to keep track of your money and make budget forecasts. It supports credit cards, has an advanced rule engine and can import data from many banks. (Demo, Source Codestars9k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
• IHateToBudgetstars117 - A simple web app to understand and control your expenses. GPL-3.0 Docker/Python
• turndown - HTML to Markdown converter written in Javascript. (Source Codestars6.4k) MIT Javascript
• mkaczanowski pastebinstars122 - Simple, fast, feature-rich, standalone pastebin service. MIT Rust
• prologic pastebin - Simple pastebin service with convenient api and CLI. (Demo) MIT Go
• Photo Streamstars255 - Minimalist self-hosted photo stream. (Demo) MIT Ruby
• Tasksstars102 - Simple tasks and notes manager written in PHP, jQuery and Bootstrap using a custom flat file database. MPL-2.0 PHP
• wiki - Simple Markdown based wiki engine. (Demo) MIT Go

• CTPP - The CTPP Program procures tabulations of American Community Survey (ACS) 5-year (and historical Census decennial) data. The chief differences between ACS data and CTPP data are FLOWS from home to work and WORKPLACE BASED data at small Geographies.
• m2cgenstars2.2k - A CLI tool to transpile trained classic ML models into a native PowerShell code with zero dependencies.
• Visual regression testing using Jest, Chromeless and AWS Lambdastars17 - Tutorial using Chromeless and jest-image-snapshot.
• Getscreen.me — Free for 2 devices, no limits on the number and duration of sessions
• VueJS Turkey - Telegram Group
• vue3-circle-progressstars18 - Highly customizable Vue.js 3 circular progressbar component.

• Apify — Web scraping and automation platform to create an API for any website and extract data. Ready-made scrapers, integrated proxies, and custom solutions. Free plan with $5 platform credits included every month.
• 3XR - A project by microchipgnu that has integrated with Mintbase to create virtual galleries for NFT artwork on NEAR.
• react-three-fiberstars19.9k - A React renderer for three.js. Additional WebXR-specific hooks and components are available in React XRstars1.3k as well.
• Spaces VRstars123 - A front end framework for quickly creating VR websites built on react-three-fiber.
• Visual Studio Tools for AI - Develop, debug and deploy deep learning and AI solutions
• glry.xyz - A site that hosts virtual galleries for NFT art on the Tezos blockchain.
• beats - A semi-collaborative app with various rooms where anyone can create or modify an existing musical loop.
• Cybr - Offers a platform for live immersive listening parties. The recorded portions of their first listening party are still available to view.
• Fathom VR - A WebXR version of the music discovery app Fathom, which lets you search for and explore clouds of related artists with spatialized audio.
• Helicon - An immersive introduction to polyrhythms.
• TRACK - A linear ride through an immersive audiovisual experience developed by Little Workshop.
• ReadyPlayerMe - Lets you quickly and easily create a 3D avatar online that you can download in glTF format.
• Brushwork VR - A VR app that simulates the process of painting with a virtual canvas, palette, color mixing, and more.
• Silk Brush - A port of Tilt Brush to WebXR with plans for future extensions.
• VRoid - Lets you create anime-styled 3D avatars that export to the highly-compatible .vrm format.
• three.js Forum - Official three.js forum.
• PlayCanvas Forum - Official PlayCanvas forum.
• r/WebVR - Initially the main subreddit for WebVR discussion, now features general WebXR content along with r/WebXR.
• 2WSZ - An aggregator for WebXR content featuring ratings, a recommendation system, and both English and Korean language support.
• Construct Arcade - A curated hub of WebXR games, with games from both outside developers and in-house developers at Vhite Rabbit.
• XR Swim - An aggregator site for both WebXR and Web3 content.
• XRSites - An aggregator for WebXR games and experiences.

• A-Frame - Lets you create VR experiences using declarative HTML and custom JavaScript components built on top of three.js.
    • Official Documentation
• JanusWebstars144 - An in-browser implementation of JanusVR that lets you build social VR experiences.

• LÖVR - A Lua-based framework that lets you create VR content across web and native platforms.
    • Official Documentation
• p5.xr - An add-on for the library p5.js that allows you to create immersive p5 sketches.

• three.js - A JavaScript library for rendering 3D content with WebGL that powers many existing WebXR experiences and tools.
    • Official Documentation
• Dreamwave - A web-based platform for hosting scalable virtual events. Powered the virtual music festival Secret Sky 2021.
• Hubs - Mozilla's platform for enabling users to gather and collaborate virtually.
• vrland - A platform for gathering and virtual showcases that supports displaying of NFTs.
• Somnium Space Web - A web viewer that allows you to explore parcels from Somnium Space in your browser, with VR support on the Oculus Quest browser.
• Moonrider - A rhythm game built by Supermedium similar to Beat Saber.
• Learn A-Frame (VR) - A roughly 6-hour Codecademy course written in partnership with A-Frame.
• babylon.js Guided Learning - Detailed text and video tutorials that complement the other instructional pages in the documentation.
• DevTools - a suite of debugging and performance tools for Dart and Flutter.
• FRAME - A platform focused on enabling easy 3D collaborations in a virtual space.

• Verge3D - A toolkit that allows 3D artists to export their scenes and create immersive web experiences with ease.
    • Official Documentation

• Godot - A cross-platform, open-source engine with WebXR support as of version 3.2.4.
    • Official Documentation

• nunuStudio - A multiplatform, open-source engine built on three.js that can be used natively or in the browser.
    • Official Documentation

• PlayCanvas - A browser-based WebGL engine with support for WebXR content, mobile browsers, collaborative editing, and more.
    • Official Documentation

• Unity - A highly popular game engine with community packages that enable content to be exported for WebXR.
    • WebXR Exportstars587 - Exporter by De-Panther
    • SimpleWebXRstars450 - Exporter by Rufus31415
• Loic Tetrel - Data science blog
• Seastarstars7k - An advanced, open-source C++ framework for high-performance server applications on modern hardware. [Apache-2.0 License] seastar.io
• kalkerstars1.1k - A scientific calculator that supports math-like syntax with user-defined variables, functions, derivation, integration, and complex numbers. Cross platform + WASM support
• joseluisq/static-web-serverstars429 — A blazing fast and asynchronous web server for static files-serving. ⚡
• BayesWitnesses/m2cgenstars2.2k — A CLI tool to transpile trained classic machine learning models into a native Rust code with zero dependencies.
• jesusprubio/legstars202 — Elegant print for lazy devs. Make your CLIs nicer with minimal effort.
• fleabitdev/gamelispstars346 — A LISP-lisk scripting language for Rust game development
• Load Testing Done Right with Gatling - Stéphane Landelle @ Voxxed Days Belgrade 2015.
• Performance Testing with Gatling - Tutorial series by Tomi Tiihonen.
• Gatling Tutorials for Beginners - Tutorial series by James Willett.
• Awesome k6stars278 - Open-source, developer-centric performance monitoring and load testing solution.
• Lightrun - Debug production servers using a plugin in the IDE (on-prem or SaaS) that supports Java, Node.js, and Python.
• Rookout - Debug production servers via a cloud-based debugger. Supporting Java, .Net, Node.js, Python, and Ruby.
• gitlocalize.com - Free and unlimited for both private and public repositories
• Dynamic_logistics_Warehousestars78 - Gazebo simulation of dynamics environment in warehouses.
• OpenCDAstars680 - A generalized framework for prototyping full-stack cooperative driving automation applications under CARLA+SUMO.
• Policy Guides - Policy Guides represent APA's official position on critical planning issues and arm planners with the tools to advocate for policies that create great communities for all.

• NCCS Data Services - The NASA Center for Climate Simulation houses curated data collections that include atmosphere, ocean, land, and flood data, both current and historical, as well as operational Global Modeling and Assimilation Office (GMAO) weather analysis data and forecasts that are updated four times daily.
• Dashbird - Serverless realtime monitoring.
• SerpApi - Real-time search engine scraping API.
• Drool - Replay DNS traffic from packet capture files and send it to a specified server, such as for simulating DDoS attacks on the DNS and measuring normal DNS querying.
• m2cgenstars2.2k - A CLI tool to transpile trained classic ML models into a native C code with zero dependencies. [MIT]
• m2cgenstars2.2k - A CLI tool to transpile trained classic ML models into a native Dart code with zero dependencies.
• 🍓 CakeDC/PHPStanstars16 - A PHPStan extension to resolve CakePHP magic around getter return types for the static analyzer.
• Practice Python Projects - Sundeep Agarwal
• The Big Book of Small Python Projects - Al Sweigart
• poplstars114 - A single-header templated command line arguments and ini file parser for C++ 11 and beyond. [MIT]

• Sempare Template Enginestars55. [Delphi] The template engine allows for flexible text manipulation. It can be used for generating email, html, source code, xml, configuration, etc. It is very easy to use, flexible and extensible, where templates are readable and maintainable. It supports: conditions, looping, custom functions and referencing data via RTTI. XE4, XE8+
• Nullpobug.ArgumentParserstars39. [Delphi] [FPC] Command-line parser for Delphi and Free Pascal
• DDevExtensionsstars95. Extends the Delphi/C++Builder IDE by adding some new productivity features.

• GNAP - Grant Negotiation and Authorization Protocol defines a mechanism for delegating authorization to a piece of software, and conveying that delegation to the software. This delegation can include access to a set of APIs as well as information passed directly to the software.DRAFT
• upf-bpfstars122 - An in-kernel solution based on XDP for 5G UPF.
• pdfvuerstars739 - A PDF viewer for Vue using Mozilla's PDF.js with text support for Vue2 and Vue3. Demo
• matplotplusplusstars2.9k - C++ Graphics Library for Data Visualization. [MIT] website
• Kratosstars728 - framework for building parallel, multi-disciplinary simulation software, aiming at modularity, extensibility, and high performance. [BSD] website
